statement: In every magma, Equation 2189 (`x = ((y * z) * y) * (z * w)`) implies Equation 3561 (`x * y = y * ((y * z) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0184
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) y) (op z w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op y (op (op y z) x))
